$schema: Each entry: { formats: [<format>...], variants?: { <name>: { formats: [...], documentYml?: <partial-yaml> } } }. The default (no-variant) build is always run with the top-level `formats` list. Variants clone the source into a tmp dir, deep-merge `documentYml` into the rendered document.yml, and compile each listed format. Any unlisted document directory under documents/ falls back to the format declared in its document.yml(.hbs) and produces a warning.
